category_title: Students who become bored and disruptive or sleepy during constant lecturing
minimal_context: The student is sitting in a general classroom setting listening to a lecture where the teacher focuses primarily on successful students.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's continue the lecture. I am going to pay attention to those who are successful and hardworking to answer this next part.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Some teachers discriminates the students as lazy or hardworking, thus I hate almost all the teachers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please just listen to the lecture.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I do not pay enough attention to the class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to finish covering this material.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don’t find the class interesting. (Turns to friends and talks to each other, takes a paper and starts cutting it because of boredom)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's continue the lecture. I am going to pay attention to those who are successful and hardworking to answer this next part.

STUDENT: Some teachers discriminates the students as lazy or hardworking, thus I hate almost all the teachers.

TUTOR: Please just listen to the lecture.

STUDENT: I do not pay enough attention to the class.

TUTOR: We need to finish covering this material.

STUDENT: I don’t find the class interesting. (Turns to friends and talks to each other, takes a paper and starts cutting it because of boredom)
